violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization. Observed a maximum temperature of 156.1?F when tested.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the soda machine ice bin.

inspections.comments: Kitchen dish machine is currently out of order. The establishment is working with the leasing company to get the machine repaired. The 3 step method is being ustilized for sanitizing all utensils through the 3 compartment sink.

violations.description: SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single use spoons noted being reused for sauces in the prep top coolers.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Employee toilet room doors noted not self closing.
